title: Fuel Canister
description: Fill a FuelCanister with burnable items and use it one by one in a furnace for more efficient operation
body:
The Fuel Canister mod adds one Item: the FuelCanister.

It can be filled with different kinds of Fuel and then be used in a Furnace, where it burns one item at a time for maximum smelting efficiency.

## Filling the Canister

The Canister can be filled in two ways:

1. Combining it with any burnable fuel in a crafting grid
2. Right-clicking the Item, which consumes all fuels in your inventory. This only consumes, that are whitelisted in the config.

Note, that the right-click method does not work in creative mode and I will not put effort into fixing this, as I see it as a non-issue.

## Creative Canister

This mod also adds a Creative FuelCanister Item, that can only be obtained in the creative Tab. It does not consume fuel when burning and acts as an infinite fuel source

## Crafting

![Image of the crafting Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/gaki8KB.png)

## Configuration

The configuration uses the standard Forge Config Format and provides 3 Options.
They are documented inside the toml files.

The configuration Option autoFuels is used to define which items are used by the right-click refueling.

It is a list of items, where each item can either be just an Item ID, or a JSON-Ingredient like in a Recipe.
Quotes (") in the Ingredient must be escaped with a Backslash (\)
